Now Hiring – Vizianagaram (Company HQ)

Medical Representative Jobs in Vizianagaram, Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma is headquartered in Vizianagaram — which means MR jobs here come with a unique advantage: direct access to management, the best training support in the company, and the fastest career progression path of any AP territory. If you are a pharma professional based in Vizianagaram and want to represent a WHO GMP certified brand you can be proud of, this is your best opportunity.

📍 Vizianagaram – Company HQ 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🏆 Direct Management Access ✅ WHO GMP Certified Brand
💬 Apply via WhatsApp View All Openings
HQ City Advantage

Why an MR Role in Vizianagaram is Different

Being headquartered in Vizianagaram gives MRs working here benefits that no other AP territory can offer.

As a Medical Representative in Vizianagaram, you work in the same city as our founding management team. This means that when you need a query resolved, a detailing aid redesigned, or a doctor escalation handled — it happens faster than anywhere else. You are not managing decisions through a field manager chain; you have direct access to the people who make them.

The Vizianagaram MR role is also the strongest career launchpad in the company. Promotions to Area Sales Manager have happened faster from the HQ territory than from any other, because your work is visible to management directly and training investment is highest here. MRs who want to grow into leadership roles within Crasenim Pharma should start in Vizianagaram.

Vizianagaram MR Territory

Vizianagaram City, Bobbili, Parvathipuram, Salur, Rajam, Gajapathinagaram — covering the full Vizianagaram district as an experienced MR with growth potential

Three Reasons to Start Your MR Career in Vizianagaram

1. Direct Management Access: Your work is seen and rewarded by management directly — not through layers of field reporting.

2. Best Training: The Vizianagaram team benefits from the most frequent and thorough product training sessions of any territory.

3. Fastest Promotions: HQ territory performers have the highest internal promotion rate in the company.

  • Direct access to founding management for queries and support
  • Highest training frequency of any AP territory
  • Fastest internal promotion path to ASM and beyond
  • Full product range including all six categories
  • Commission roles available alongside full-time positions
Current Openings

Pharma Job Vacancies in Vizianagaram

MR and field sales roles in Crasenim Pharma's headquarters city — experienced candidates from the Vizianagaram district preferred.

Medical Representative – Vizianagaram City
📍 Vizianagaram, Andhra Pradesh 💼 Full-Time Permanent 🕒 1–3 Years Pharma Experience
Now Hiring
  • Promote Crasenim Pharma's WHO GMP certified medicines to GPs, specialists and pharmacies in Vizianagaram city
  • Build lasting doctor relationships in the HQ city — receive direct training and support from our management team
  • Achieve monthly targets with the benefit of strong local brand recognition in the Vizianagaram medical community
  • Competitive base salary + performance incentives + travel allowance
MR – Bobbili / Parvathipuram Sub-Territory
📍 Bobbili / Parvathipuram, Vizianagaram Dist. 💼 Full-Time Permanent 🕒 1–3 Years Pharma Experience
Now Hiring
  • Cover the Bobbili and Parvathipuram sub-territory of Vizianagaram district as an independent MR
  • Build GP and government hospital prescription base in these high-potential secondary markets
  • Receive field support and management visits from Vizianagaram HQ team directly
  • Local candidates from Bobbili or Parvathipuram strongly preferred
Commission-Based MR – Vizianagaram
📍 Vizianagaram, Andhra Pradesh 💼 Commission / Flexible 🕒 Any Experience Welcome
Now Hiring
  • Earn commission on every Crasenim Pharma prescription you generate in Vizianagaram
  • No investment required — can be combined with existing employment
  • Benefit from the highest brand recognition in AP for easy doctor introduction
  • Monthly incentive bonuses for top-performing commission MRs in the HQ city
Why Crasenim Pharma

Why Join Us as an MR in Vizianagaram?

Quality Brand

WHO GMP Certified Products

Represent a brand manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS under WHO GMP standards. Detailing is easy when doctors know the products are made to the highest manufacturing standards.

Best Incentives

Competitive Pay + HQ Bonuses

Base salary, monthly incentives for hitting targets, travel allowance, and the highest incentive recognition rates in the company for Vizianagaram territory performers.

Career Growth

Fastest ASM Promotion Path

MR → Senior MR → Area Sales Manager → Regional SM. The Vizianagaram territory has the highest internal promotion rate in the company. Your growth is directly visible to management.

Full Support

Direct Management Training

Product training, visual aids, samples, and direct access to our founding team for any detailing or territorial challenge. The Vizianagaram team receives the most comprehensive support of any AP territory.

FAQs

MR Jobs in Vizianagaram – FAQ

Why is working as an MR in Vizianagaram better than other AP cities?
Vizianagaram is Crasenim Pharma's headquarters city. MRs here benefit from the strongest brand recognition in the local medical community, direct access to management and training without layers of field management bureaucracy, and the fastest promotion path in the company. Vizianagaram performers are consistently the first to be considered for ASM roles.
What experience is required for MR jobs in Vizianagaram?
For full-time roles, 1–3 years of pharmaceutical field sales experience is preferred. For commission-based roles, motivated candidates with a local Vizianagaram doctor network are welcome even without extensive experience. Training is provided for all candidates.
Can I cover Bobbili or Parvathipuram as part of my Vizianagaram MR role?
Yes. Depending on your experience level, the Vizianagaram MR territory can include Bobbili, Parvathipuram, Salur and other district sub-markets. Alternatively, separate MR positions are available for candidates who are based in those towns.
How do I apply for a pharma MR job in Vizianagaram?
WhatsApp your name, experience and current location to +91 99890 74806, or apply through our Careers page. Our HR team responds within 2 working days.

Apply for MR Jobs in Vizianagaram Today

Start your pharma career at Crasenim Pharma's headquarters. Send your details and our team will respond within 2 working days.
